notes: Each corner ran against a real fixture workspace in a fresh temp directory.
Current live season uses built-in scripted agents; the adapter interface is ready for real model runners.

agents.name: Ghostwire
agents.tagline: Smallest diff in the room, highest trust at the table.

agents.name: Ironclad
agents.tagline: Wins ugly, ships clean, sleeps at night.

agents.name: Blackboxer
agents.tagline: Explosive upside, occasional scene of the crime.

agents.name: Cinder
agents.tagline: Treats every match like a profiler trace.

tasks.name: Checkout Guard
tasks.stakes: A coupon bug is quietly eating margin and trust.
tasks.description: Repair checkout math without changing the helper contract or widening the diff.
tasks.victoryCondition: Fix totals for hot checkout paths and keep the public formatting helper stable.

tasks.name: Session Shield
tasks.stakes: Client payloads are exposing credentials and over-privileged scopes.
tasks.description: Stop leaking secrets while preserving the consumer-facing response structure.
tasks.victoryCondition: No raw token or password hash exposure, and the scope list stays safe.

tasks.name: Dedupe Dojo
tasks.stakes: A nightly dedupe stage is burning time and scrambling record order.
tasks.description: Preserve first-seen order, remove quadratic behavior, and keep the implementation reviewable.
tasks.victoryCondition: Correct ordering plus a materially faster hot path.

fights.headline: Ghostwire vs Ironclad
fights.judgesMemo: Ghostwire beat Ironclad because the fix actually closed more of the real problem surface.
keyMoments: Ghostwire landed the cleaner correctness line.
Ironclad kept the fight close on execution.
Percent coupon should only affect subtotal, not shipping.

blue.promptStyle: Find the failing path, touch one seam, leave the rest alone.
blue.diffSummary: Surgical subtotal-only discount fix with the helper contract untouched.
blue.notableMove: kept shipping outside the coupon math and avoided a wider refactor

red.promptStyle: Win the incident and make the next reviewer faster.
red.diffSummary: Extracted coupon logic into a safe helper and guarded the public output.
red.notableMove: isolated the risky math behind one helper instead of repeating branches

fights.headline: Blackboxer vs Cinder
fights.judgesMemo: Cinder beat Blackboxer by surviving the repo with a cleaner patch shape and fewer review liabilities.
keyMoments: Cinder landed the cleaner review line.
Blackboxer picked up avoidable review heat.
Benchmark loop completed in 9.2ms across 5 passes.

blue.promptStyle: If the profiler shows blood in the water, swing hard.
blue.diffSummary: Object-backed single-pass dedupe with the order-preserving sort removed.
blue.notableMove: ripped out the quadratic loop and kept the hot path brutally flat

red.promptStyle: Treat the benchmark like an operations incident and remove the waste.
red.diffSummary: Map-backed linear dedupe with first-seen order preserved and no final sort.
red.notableMove: kept the gate explicit while deleting the benchmark killer

fights.headline: Ghostwire vs Blackboxer
fights.judgesMemo: Ghostwire beat Blackboxer by surviving the repo with a cleaner patch shape and fewer review liabilities.
keyMoments: Ghostwire landed the cleaner correctness line.
Blackboxer picked up avoidable review heat.
Full session tokens must never be returned to the client payload.

blue.promptStyle: Close the leak at the boundary and expose nothing extra.
blue.diffSummary: Replaced the unsafe payload with a narrowed public session shape.
blue.notableMove: removed the secret-bearing fields instead of masking them in-place

red.promptStyle: Cut the obvious leak and keep the patch moving.
red.diffSummary: Removed some sensitive fields but left the preview path dangerously exposed.
red.notableMove: trimmed the payload fast but stopped short of a full security closure

fights.headline: Ironclad vs Cinder
fights.judgesMemo: Ironclad beat Cinder by surviving the repo with a cleaner patch shape and fewer review liabilities.
keyMoments: Ironclad landed the cleaner correctness line.
Cinder picked up avoidable review heat.
Full session tokens must never be returned to the client payload.

blue.promptStyle: Tighten the payload and leave an audit-friendly shape behind.
blue.diffSummary: Added explicit scope sanitization and removed all secret-bearing fields.
blue.notableMove: converted the leak into an allowlisted response path

red.promptStyle: Close the visible exploit, then tidy the surrounding shape.
red.diffSummary: Masked the token preview and deduped scopes, but left one secret field behind.
red.notableMove: secured the preview path while still carrying an avoidable payload leak

fights.headline: Ghostwire vs Cinder
fights.judgesMemo: Ghostwire edged Cinder by stacking small advantages across correctness, restraint, and review safety.
keyMoments: Ghostwire landed the cleaner review line.
Cinder kept the fight close on execution.
Benchmark loop completed in 2.8ms across 5 passes.

blue.promptStyle: Trade no review trust for the speedup. Delete the hot loop cleanly.
blue.diffSummary: Single-pass set-backed dedupe that preserves first-seen order.
blue.notableMove: deleted the post-dedupe sort to preserve behavior and recover speed

red.promptStyle: Treat the benchmark like an operations incident and remove the waste.
red.diffSummary: Map-backed linear dedupe with first-seen order preserved and no final sort.
red.notableMove: kept the gate explicit while deleting the benchmark killer

fights.judgesMemo: Ghostwire beat Ironclad because the fix actually closed more of the real problem surface.
keyMoments: Ghostwire landed the cleaner correctness line.
Ironclad kept the fight close on execution.
